No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to poverty eradication or economic resources.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course directly addresses 'biological and psychological mechanisms of hunger and satiety' (Target 2.1) and 'Obesity' and 'Eating disorders' which are forms of malnutrition (Target 2.2).

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course has a core focus on mental health and well-being (Target 3.4) through 'emotional and stress-related eating', 'mindful and intuitive eating', 'Obesity', 'Eating disorders', and promoting 'healthier, more mindful food choices'.

Quality Education.reason: The course explicitly aims for students to 'apply this knowledge to promote balanced and mindful eating habits in both personal and societal contexts', directly supporting Target 4.7 on sustainable lifestyles.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to work, employment, or economic growth.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course examines the 'impact of marketing and the food environment', which can indirectly relate to sustainable urbanization and community health planning (Target 11.3, 11.6).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course promotes 'mindful and intuitive eating' and 'healthier, more mindful food choices', directly supporting sustainable consumption patterns and lifestyles (Target 12.8).

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to climate change or climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to marine ecosystems or life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to peace, justice, or institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes links to global partnerships or international cooperation.
